title: CI: require and test CI_DESIRED_NETWORK on RHEL
body:
Although podman has moved on from CNI, RHEL has not. Make
sure that builds on RHEL test the desired network backend(s).

Effective immediately, gating.yaml on all RHEL branches
must set CI_DESIRED_NETWORK (=cni or =netavark)

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>
```release-note
None
```

comments.body: LGTM. Ideally we run the tests twice, once each backend, since both are officially supported on 8/9, it's just different defaults.
Yes, that's what I sent to @jnovy a little while ago. (I seem to have lost the ability to submit PRs internally. Or more likely things just changed yet again and I didn't keep track)
